title: Welcome to Canada: Multilingual resources for newcomers - Canada.ca
content:
## Welcome to Canada: Multilingual resources for newcomers
Moving to Canada is an exciting opportunity, but also a great challenge. These resources, which are available in many languages, can help you find out what to expect in your first few weeks of coming to Canada.
- Finding a place to live
Prepare before you arrive. Learn about free pre-arrival services.
Download a PDF in one of the languages below:
- English (PDF, 653 KB)
- Arabic (PDF, 875 KB)
- French (PDF, 690 KB)
- Haitian Creole (PDF, 713 KB)
- Spanish (PDF, 650 KB)
Learn about important things to do in the first few weeks after you arrive.
Download a PDF in one of the languages below:
- English (PDF, 659 KB)
- Arabic (PDF, 916 KB)
- French (PDF, 706 KB)
- Haitian Creole (PDF, 677 KB)
- Spanish (PDF, 655 KB)

## Finding a place to live
Get settled and start preparing for your new home.
Download a PDF in one of the languages below:
- English (PDF, 1.4 MB)
- French (PDF, 1.4 MB)
- Haitian Creole (PDF, 1.4 MB)
- Spanish (PDF, 1.4 MB)

### Health care services
Learn about health care in Canada and how to get the services you need.
Download a PDF in one of the languages below:
- English (PDF, 532 KB)
- Arabic (PDF, 798 KB)
- French (PDF, 584 KB)
- Haitian Creole (PDF, 556 KB)
- Spanish (PDF, 819 KB)
Get ready to work in Canada. Learn about career options and services.
Download a PDF in one of the languages below:
- English (PDF, 912 KB)
- French (PDF, 791 KB)
- Haitian Creole (PDF, 700 KB)
- Spanish (PDF, 700 KB)

### Foreign credential recognition
Learn about foreign credential recognition and how to set yourself up for success.
Download a PDF in one of the languages below:
- English (PDF, 680 KB)
- Arabic (PDF, 874 KB)
- French (PDF, 685 KB)
- Haitian Creole (PDF, 975 KB)
- Spanish (PDF, 685 KB)

### Overview of education in Canada
Education is important. Get familiar with schooling in Canada.
Download a PDF in one of the languages below:
- English (PDF, 944 KB)
- French (PDF, 949 KB)
- Haitian Creole (PDF, 833 KB)
- Spanish (PDF, 1.2 MB)

### Post-secondary education
Continue your learning. Find more about post-secondary education.
Download a PDF in one of the languages below:
- Haitian Creole (PDF, 1 MB)
Start planning for the future. Find out about the cost of living in Canada.
Download a PDF in one of the languages below:
- English (PDF, 1.6 MB)
- French (PDF, 1.5 MB)
- Haitian Creole (PDF, 1.6 MB)
- Spanish (PDF, 1.5 MB)
Learn about building community connections in Canada.
Download a PDF in one of the languages below:
- English (PDF, 911 KB)
- French (PDF, 914 KB)
- Haitian Creole (PDF, 824 KB)
- Spanish (PDF, 812 KB)
Learn about the rights that protect you as a consumer.
Download a PDF in one of the languages below:
- English (PDF, 689 KB)
- French (PDF, 622 KB)
Learn about the identities and cultures of Indigenous Peoples of Canada.
Download a PDF in one of the languages below:
- English (PDF, 616 KB)
- French (PDF, 589 KB)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
